sections.paragraph:
μήπω adv. (Hom. et al.; POxy 1062, 15; Just., A I, 19, 3; Ath. 17, 2) not yet w. acc. and inf. μ. πεφανερῶσθαι τὴν τῶν ἁγίων ὁδόν Hb 9:8. W. ptc. (Pla., Symp. 187d; Sb 5343, 37 [182 a.d.]; Jos., Ant. 1, 217) μ. γεννηθέντων Ro 9:11. μ. φυγών 2 Cl 18:2.—M-M.

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

Ath. Ath. = Athenagoras, II a.d.—List 5

acc. acc. = accusative

inf. inf. = infinitive

ptc. ptc. = participle

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

2 Cl 2 Cl = 2 Clement—List 1

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 649
